title: athyrium × tsurutanum
intro: Athyrium × tsurutanum, also known as the Japanese Lady Fern, is a hybrid fern species that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Athyrium × tsurutanum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate pain, and regulate body temperature. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried, powdered, and used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
